notes:
Self-review completed. All error-level issues (1-3) have been successfully fixed:

1. ✅ discord/api/types.ts - Removed message_history field from TaskDetail interface
2. ✅ web/src/lib/types.ts - Removed message_history field from TaskDetail interface
3. ✅ web/src/pages/TaskDetail.tsx - Removed MessageHistory import and messages tab that accessed task.message_history

Warning-level issues (4-6) were intentionally not fixed as per instructions to only fix error-level issues.

Verification:
- All modified files pass tsx --check syntax validation
- No references to message_history remain in discord/api/types.ts, web/src/lib/types.ts, or web/src/pages/TaskDetail.tsx
- Type definitions now match runtime behavior (backend no longer returns message_history)
- Test failures are due to missing dependencies (better-sqlite3, discord.js), not our changes

The fixes ensure:
- Type safety: Frontend and backend types are now consistent
- No runtime errors: Frontend no longer accesses undefined message_history field
- Backward compatibility: Existing InteractionLog component provides alternative way to view conversation data
